<file>components/LibraryManager.tsx</file>
<description>Refactorisation de la vérification des permissions du bibliothécaire pour utiliser le système de permissions dynamique.</description>
<content><![CDATA[
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Book, Loan, LibraryNotification, SystemUser, Student } from '../types';
import { db } from '../services/db';
import { 
  BookOpen, Calendar, Bell, Search, Plus, BookMarked, 
  AlertCircle, Clock, CheckCircle, ChevronRight, X, Save, Trash2, User, AlertTriangle
} from 'lucide-react';

interface LibraryManagerProps {
  currentUser?: SystemUser;
  currentSchoolId: string;
}

const NotificationCard: React.FC<{ notif: LibraryNotification }> = ({ notif }) => {
  const icon = notif.type === 'OVERDUE' ? <AlertCircle className="text-red-500" /> : 
               notif.type === 'DUE_SOON' ? <Clock className="text-amber-500" /> : 
               <CheckCircle className="text-blue-500" />;
  
  const bgClass = notif.type === 'OVERDUE' ? 'bg-red-50 border-red-100' : 
                  notif.type === 'DUE_SOON' ? 'bg-amber-50 border-amber-100' : 
                  'bg-blue-50 border-blue-100';

  return (
    <div className={`p-4 rounded-lg border ${bgClass} flex items-start space-x-4 shadow-sm animate-in slide-in-from-right-2`}>
      <div className="mt-1">{icon}</div>
      <div className="flex-1">
        <h4 className={`font-bold text-sm ${notif.type === 'OVERDUE' ? 'text-red-800' : notif.type === 'DUE_SOON' ? 'text-amber-800' : 'text-blue-800'}`}>
          {notif.title}
        </h4>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-700 mt-1">{notif.message}</p>
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-2">
           <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{new Date(notif.date).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
           {notif.type !== 'RESERVATION' && (
              <button className="text-xs font-medium underline hover:no-underline text-gray-600">
                Voir l'emprunt
              </button>
           )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export const LibraryManager: React.FC<LibraryManagerProps> = ({ currentUser, currentSchoolId }) => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'catalog' | 'loans' | 'notifications'>('catalog');
  const [books, setBooks] = useState<Book[]>([]);
  const [loans, setLoans] = useState<Loan[]>([]);
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<LibraryNotification[]>([]);
  const [students, setStudents] = useState<Student[]>([]);

  // Modal States
  const [isBookModalOpen, setIsBookModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [isLoanModalOpen, setIsLoanModalOpen] = useState(false);
  
  // Form States
  const [newBook, setNewBook] = useState<Partial<Book>>({ status: 'AVAILABLE' });
  const [newLoan, setNewLoan] = useState({ studentId: '', bookId: '', dueDate: '' });

  useEffect(() => {
    refreshLibraryData();
  }, []);

  const refreshLibraryData = () => {
    setBooks(db.getBooks());
    setLoans(db.getLoans());
    setNotifications(db.getLibraryNotifications());
    setStudents(db.getStudents());
  };

  const canManageLibrary = currentUser ? db.hasPermission(currentSchoolId, currentUser.role, 'LIBRARY.write') : false;

  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'AVAILABLE': return 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700';
      case 'BORROWED': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700';
      case 'RESERVED': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700';
      case 'LOST': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-700';
      default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    }
  };

  // --- Handlers ---

  const handleAddBook = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (!newBook.title || !newBook.author) return;
      const book: Book = {
          id: `B${Date.now()}`,
          schoolId: currentSchoolId,
          title: newBook.title,
          author: newBook.author,
          isbn: newBook.isbn || 'N/A',
          category: newBook.category || 'Général',
          status: 'AVAILABLE'
      };
      db.saveBook(book);
      setIsBookModalOpen(false);
      setNewBook({ status: 'AVAILABLE' });
      refreshLibraryData();
  };

  const handleIssueLoan = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const student = students.find(s => s.id === newLoan.studentId);
      const book = books.find(b => b.id === newLoan.bookId);
      
      if (!student || !book) return;

      const loan: Loan = {
          id: `L-${Date.now()}`,
          schoolId: currentSchoolId,
          bookId: book.id,
          bookTitle: book.title,
          studentName: `${student.firstName} ${student.lastName}`,
          borrowDate: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
          dueDate: newLoan.dueDate,
          status: 'ACTIVE'
      };

      db.saveLoan(loan);
      setIsLoanModalOpen(false);
      setNewLoan({ studentId: '', bookId: '', dueDate: '' });
      refreshLibraryData();
      alert(`Emprunt enregistré pour ${student.firstName}.`);
  };

  const handleReturnBook = (loan: Loan) => {
      if (confirm(`Confirmer le retour de "${loan.bookTitle}" ?`)) {
          const updatedLoan: Loan = { ...loan, status: 'RETURNED', returnDate: new Date().toISOString() };
          db.saveLoan(updatedLoan);
          refreshLibraryData();
      }
  };

  const handleReportLost = (loan: Loan) => {
      if (confirm(`SIGNALER COMME PERDU ?\n\nCela va déclencher une procédure de facturation auprès de l'économe pour l'élève ${loan.studentName}.`)) {
          db.reportLostBook(loan.id);
          refreshLibraryData();
          alert("Livre déclaré perdu. L'économe et les parents ont été notifiés.");
      }
  };

  const simulateReservation = () => {
     const newNotif: LibraryNotification = {
         id: `res-${Date.now()}`,
         type: 'RESERVATION',
         title: 'Réservation disponible',
         message: 'Le livre "Le Petit Prince" que vous aviez réservé est maintenant disponible au retrait.',
         date: new Date().toISOString(),
         read: false
     };
     setNotifications([newNotif, ...notifications]);
     alert('Simulation: Notification de réservation envoyée.');
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-[calc(100vh-140px)] gap-6">
      {/* Left Sidebar Navigation */}
      <div className="w-64 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        <div className="p-5 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center">
            <BookOpen className="mr-2 text-blue-600" size={20} />
            Bibliothèque
          </h3>
          {canManageLibrary && <span className="text-[10px] bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded mt-1 inline-block">Mode Gestion</span>}
        </div>
        <nav className="flex-1 p-2 space-y-1">
          <button 
            onClick={() => setActiveTab('catalog')}
            className={`w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${activeTab === 'catalog' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700' : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'}`}
          >
            <div className="flex items-center"><Search size={18} className="mr-3" /> Catalogue</div>
            <ChevronRight size={16} className="text-gray-300" />
          </button>
          <button 
            onClick={() => setActiveTab('loans')}
            className={`w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${activeTab === 'loans' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700' : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'}`}
          >
            <div className="flex items-center"><Calendar size={18} className="mr-3" /> Emprunts & Retours</div>
            {loans.filter(l => l.status === 'OVERDUE').length > 0 && (
               <span className="bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                 {loans.filter(l => l.status === 'OVERDUE').length}
               </span>
            )}
          </button>
          <button 
            onClick={() => setActiveTab('notifications')}
            className={`w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${activeTab === 'notifications' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700' : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'}`}
          >
             <div className="flex items-center"><Bell size={18} className="mr-3" /> Notifications</div>
             {notifications.length > 0 && (
               <span className="bg-amber-500 text-white text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                 {notifications.length}
               </span>
             )}
          </button>
        </nav>
        
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-100 bg-gray-50 space-y-2">
             {!canManageLibrary && (
               <button 
                  onClick={simulateReservation}
                  className="w-full py-2 border border-blue-200 text-blue-600 rounded bg-white hover:bg-blue-50 text-xs font-medium"
               >
                   Simuler "Réservation Prête"
               </button>
             )}
             {canManageLibrary && (
                 <button 
                    onClick={() => setIsLoanModalOpen(true)}
                    className="w-full py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded hover:bg-blue-700 text-xs font-medium flex items-center justify-center"
                 >
                    <Plus size={14} className="mr-1" /> Nouvel Emprunt
                 </button>
             )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Main Content */}
      <div className="flex-1 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden flex flex-col">
        
        {/* TAB: CATALOG */}
        {activeTab === 'catalog' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
                <div className="p-5 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center">
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">Fonds Documentaire</h2>
                    <div className="flex space-x-2">
                        <input type="text" placeholder="ISBN, Titre, Auteur..." className="border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 outline-none w-64" />
                        {canManageLibrary && (
                            <button 
                                onClick={() => setIsBookModalOpen(true)}
                                className="bg-blue-600 text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-blue-700 flex items-center"
                            >
                                <Plus size={16} className="mr-1" /> Ajouter Livre
                            </button>
                        )}
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div className="overflow-auto flex-1">
                    <table className="w-full text-left">
                        <thead className="bg-gray-50 text-xs uppercase text-gray-500 sticky top-0">
                            <tr>
                                <th className="px-6 py-3">Titre / Auteur</th>
                                <th className="px-6 py-3">Catégorie</th>
                                <th className="px-6 py-3">ISBN</th>
                                <th className="px-6 py-3">Statut</th>
                                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-right">Action</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
                            {books.map(book => (
                                <tr key={book.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                                        <div className="font-medium text-gray-900">{book.title}</div>
                                        <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{book.author}</div>
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm text-gray-600">{book.category}</td>
                                    <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm font-mono text-gray-500">{book.isbn}</td>
                                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                                        <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold ${getStatusColor(book.status)}`}>{book.status}</span>
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="px-6 py-4 text-right">
                                        {canManageLibrary ? (
                                            <button className="text-gray-400 hover:text-red-600"><Trash2 size={18} /></button>
                                        ) : (
                                            <button className="text-gray-400 hover:text-blue-600"><BookMarked size={18} /></button>
                                        )}
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            ))}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {/* TAB: LOANS */}
        {activeTab === 'loans' && (
             <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
                <div className="p-5 border-b border-gray-100">
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800">Suivi des Emprunts</h2>
                </div>
                <div className="overflow-auto flex-1">
                    <table className="w-full text-left">
                        <thead className="bg-gray-50 text-xs uppercase text-gray-500 sticky top-0">
                            <tr>
                                <th className="px-6 py-3">Élève</th>
                                <th className="px-6 py-3">Livre</th>
                                <th className="px-6 py-3">Sortie</th>
                                <th className="px-6 py-3">Retour Prévu</th>
                                <th className="px-6 py-3">État</th>
                                {canManageLibrary && <th className="px-6 py-3 text-right">Gestion</th>}
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
                            {loans.map(loan => (
                                <tr key={loan.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                                    <td className="px-6 py-4 font-medium text-gray-900">{loan.studentName}</td>
                                    <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm text-gray-600">{loan.bookTitle}</td>
                                    <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm text-gray-500">{new Date(loan.borrowDate).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                                    <td className={`px-6 py-4 text-sm font-bold ${loan.status === 'OVERDUE' ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-gray-600'}`}>
                                        {new Date(loan.dueDate).toLocaleDateString()}
                                    </td>
                                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                                         <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold ${loan.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : loan.status === 'OVERDUE' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700'}`}>
                                             {loan.status === 'OVERDUE' ? 'RETARD' : loan.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'EN COURS' : 'RENDU'}
                                         </span>
                                    </td>
                                    {canManageLibrary && (
                                        <td className="px-6 py-4 text-right">
                                            {(loan.status === 'ACTIVE' || loan.status === 'OVERDUE') && (
                                                <div className="flex justify-end space-x-2">
                                                    <button 
                                                        onClick={() => handleReturnBook(loan)}
                                                        className="p-1 text-green-600 hover:bg-green-50 rounded" 
                                                        title="Confirmer le retour"
                                                    >
                                                        <CheckCircle size={18} />
                                                    </button>
                                                    <button 
                                                        onClick={() => handleReportLost(loan)}
                                                        className="p-1 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded" 
                                                        title="Signaler comme perdu (Facturation)"
                                                    >
                                                        <AlertTriangle size={18} />
                                                    </button>
                                                </div>
                                            )}
                                        </td>
                                    )}
                                </tr>
                            ))}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

        {/* TAB: NOTIFICATIONS */}
        {activeTab === 'notifications' && (
            <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
                <div className="p-5 border-b border-gray-100 bg-white">
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 flex items-center">
                        <Bell className="mr-2 text-amber-500" size={24} />
                        Centre de Notifications
                    </h2>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">
                        Alertes de retards, rappels d'échéances et suivi des réservations.
                    </p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 bg-slate-50">
                    <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto space-y-4">
                        {notifications.length === 0 ? (
                            <div className="text-center py-12">
                                <CheckCircle size={48} className="mx-auto text-gray-300 mb-4" />
                                <p className="text-gray-500">Aucune notification pour le moment.</p>
                            </div>
                        ) : (
                            notifications.map(notif => (
                                <NotificationCard key={notif.id} notif={notif} />
                            ))
                        )}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        )}

      </div>

      {/* Add Book Modal */}
      {isBookModalOpen && (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl w-full max-w-md p-6 animate-in zoom-in-95">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                      <h3 className="text-lg font-bold">Ajouter un Livre</h3>
                      <button onClick={() => setIsBookModalOpen(false)}><X className="text-gray-400" /></button>
                  </div>
                  <form onSubmit={handleAddBook} className="space-y-3">
                      <input 
                          className="w-full p-2 border rounded" 
                          placeholder="Titre" 
                          value={newBook.title || ''} 
                          onChange={e => setNewBook({...newBook, title: e.target.value})} 
                          required 
                      />
                      <input 
                          className="w-full p-2 border rounded" 
                          placeholder="Auteur" 
                          value={newBook.author || ''} 
                          onChange={e => setNewBook({...newBook, author: e.target.value})} 
                          required 
                      />
                      <input 
                          className="w-full p-2 border rounded" 
                          placeholder="ISBN" 
                          value={newBook.isbn || ''} 
                          onChange={e => setNewBook({...newBook, isbn: e.target.value})} 
                      />
                      <select 
                          className="w-full p-2 border rounded bg-white"
                          value={newBook.category}
                          onChange={e => setNewBook({...newBook, category: e.target.value})}
                      >
                          <option value="Général">Général</option>
                          <option value="Roman">Roman</option>
                          <option value="Manuel Scolaire">Manuel Scolaire</option>
                          <option value="Science-Fiction">Science-Fiction</option>
                          <option value="Jeunesse">Jeunesse</option>
                      </select>
                      <div className="flex justify-end space-x-2 pt-2">
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => setIsBookModalOpen(false)} className="px-4 py-2 text-gray-600">Annuler</button>
                          <button type="submit" className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded">Enregistrer</button>
                      </div>
                  </form>
              </div>
          </div>
      )}

      {/* Issue Loan Modal */}
      {isLoanModalOpen && (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl w-full max-w-md p-6 animate-in zoom-in-95">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                      <h3 className="text-lg font-bold">Nouvel Emprunt</h3>
                      <button onClick={() => setIsLoanModalOpen(false)}><X className="text-gray-400" /></button>
                  </div>
                  <form onSubmit={handleIssueLoan} className="space-y-3">
                      <div>
                          <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Élève</label>
                          <select 
                              className="w-full p-2 border rounded bg-white"
                              value={newLoan.studentId}
                              onChange={e => setNewLoan({...newLoan, studentId: e.target.value})}
                              required
                          >
                              <option value="">Choisir un élève...</option>
                              {students.map(s => (
                                  <option key={s.id} value={s.id}>{s.firstName} {s.lastName} ({s.classGrade})</option>
                              ))}
                          </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                          <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Livre Disponible</label>
                          <select 
                              className="w-full p-2 border rounded bg-white"
                              value={newLoan.bookId}
                              onChange={e => setNewLoan({...newLoan, bookId: e.target.value})}
                              required
                          >
                              <option value="">Choisir un livre...</option>
                              {books.filter(b => b.status === 'AVAILABLE').map(b => (
                                  <option key={b.id} value={b.id}>{b.title} - {b.author}</option>
                              ))}
                          </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                          <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Date de retour prévue</label>
                          <input 
                              type="date"
                              className="w-full p-2 border rounded"
                              value={newLoan.dueDate}
                              onChange={e => setNewLoan({...newLoan, dueDate: e.target.value})}
                              required
                          />
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex justify-end space-x-2 pt-2">
                          <button type="button" onClick={() => setIsLoanModalOpen(false)} className="px-4 py-2 text-gray-600">Annuler</button>
                          <button type="submit" className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded">Valider l'emprunt</button>
                      </div>
                  </form>
              </div>
          </div>
      )}

    </div>
  );
};
]]></content>
</change>
</changes>

**Analyzing the Typescript Error**

I'm currently focused on resolving the TypeScript error in `components/GradesManager.tsx`. The crux of the issue is a missing `logoUrl` property on the `SchoolConfig` type. I've examined `types.ts`, and confirmed that `SchoolConfig` currently only includes `schoolName` and `address`. payload.text:
ajoute un module de gestion de la cantine comprenant :
- la gestion de stock des dépenses d'approvisionnement (à préciser les types de nourritures entrant dans la préparation par jours - par mois- par année)
- la gestion des recettes journalières
- la gestion des recettes mensuelle
- la gestion des recettes annuelle
- le bilan des recettes et dépenses (par jour - par mois - par année) présenter la gestion globale de la cantine

**Developing the Module Structure**

I'm currently focused on the structural framework for this "Canteen Management" module. I've been dissecting the requirements to identify key components: stock management with expense tracking, menu planning, sales and order processing, and comprehensive reporting. The central challenge lies in designing an integrated system that smoothly connects all these aspects while ensuring user-friendliness and scalability.


**Analyzing Canteen Data Flows**

I'm now deep-diving into the financial aspects, focusing on revenue streams and expense tracking – daily, monthly, yearly. I'm also considering creating a financial balance sheet to compare income versus expenses, and of course, a global overview dashboard. Simultaneously, I'm adapting the data model. There is a need to identify interfaces: `CanteenItem`, `CanteenMeal` (for menu), `CanteenMovement`, as it's inventory and not financial transactions.


**Adding Canteen Functionality**

I've just added the 'CANTEEN' enum value to the `SchoolModule`, and I'm updating `constants.ts` to include this module in `AVAILABLE_MODULES`, along with the necessary permissions and mock data. Next, I'm working on the database service, fleshing out methods to manage canteen items, stock movements, and sales. Sales will link to the general transaction system, but inventory remains distinct.  The UI will have a new `CanteenManager` component with a dashboard for quick stats, an inventory section for stock control, and a sales form for recording transactions.


**Developing Canteen Interface**

I'm now detailing the user interface, sketching out the `CanteenManager` component with tabs for overview, stock management (including CRUD operations), sales, and reports. Reports, specifically, will show income versus expenses over time, visualized with charts or tables. I've also incorporated the canteen link into the sidebar. I'm currently working on adding the new enums and types, including the `CanteenItem` and `CanteenStockLog` as a preliminary step.


**Calculating Canteen Incomes**

I'm now implementing the income tracking for the canteen module. My approach involves filtering transactions by type to separate `IN` and `OUT` values, and then aggregating these based on daily, monthly, and yearly timeframes, as per the user's request.  Additionally, I am working on using appropriate icons to represent the category types within the Canteen Items.


**Refining Canteen Implementation**

I've just added the "CANTEEN" value to `types.ts` and updated the module list. Also, I created the `CanteenItem` interface within the module.  Permissions and initial inventory data are in `constants.ts`, and I've added a canteen icon to the sidebar. The routing structure is handled in `App.tsx`. I'm starting on the `CanteenManager` component and just realized that I need food categories in the stock tab. Stock updates now include cost tracking, and sales capture income amounts.


**Detailing Financial Reporting**

I'm currently working on the financial reporting features. Income versus expenses will be presented using a bar chart and summary table within the 'Rapports' tab, as a visual representation of the financial health of the canteen. The daily, monthly, and yearly incomes, and expenses, are aggregated and available through the sales tab and on the dashboard.

Pour intégrer ce module complet de gestion de cantine, je vais procéder aux ajouts suivants :

1.  **Mise à jour des Types (`types.ts`)** : Ajout du module `CANTEEN`, et définition des interfaces pour le stock (`CanteenItem`) et les mouvements de stock.
2.  **Mise à jour des Constantes (`constants.ts`)** : Configuration du module Cantine, permissions associées et données de test (ingrédients, stocks).
3.  **Services (`services/db.ts`)** : Ajout des fonctions pour gérer l'inventaire et lier les approvisionnements aux transactions financières.
4.  **Nouveau Composant (`components/CanteenManager.tsx`)** : Création d'une interface riche avec 4 onglets :
    *   **Tableau de bord** : Vue globale.
    *   **Stock & Approvisionnement** : Gestion des ingrédients (Viandes, Céréales, Légumes...) et saisie des dépenses.
    *   **Ventes & Recettes** : Saisie des tickets repas vendus (Journalier).
    *   **Bilan & Rapports** : Analyse comparative Recettes vs Dépenses (Jour/Mois/Année).
5.  **Navigation (`App.tsx` & `Sidebar.tsx`)** : Intégration du nouveau menu.

Voici les modifications :

entries.description: Ajout du module CANTEEN et des types liés à la gestion de stock cantine
Ajout de la configuration du module Cantine, permissions et données de mock
Ajout des fonctions pour la gestion du stock cantine et lien avec les transactions
Ajout de l'icône Cantine dans la barre latérale
Intégration du composant CanteenManager dans le routage de l'App
Nouveau composant complet de gestion de la cantine (Stock, Ventes, Bilan)

2.  **Mise à jour des Constantes (`constants.ts`)** : Ajout des permissions, de la configuration du module et de données fictives pour l'emploi du temps.
3.  **Mise à jour de la Base de Données (`services/db.ts`)** : Ajout des méthodes pour sauvegarder, récupérer et supprimer des créneaux, ainsi qu'une logique de **détection de conflits** (professeur ou salle déjà pris).
4.  **Mise à jour de la Sidebar (`components/Sidebar.tsx`)** : Ajout de l'entrée dans le menu.
5.  **Création du composant `TimeTableManager.tsx`** : C'est le cœur du module. Il permettra :
    *   Une visualisation hebdomadaire (Grille Lundi-Vendredi).
    *   Le filtrage par **Classe** (vue Élève/Admin) ou par **Professeur** (vue RH).
    *   L'ajout de cours avec vérification automatique des conflits.
    *   L'impression de l'emploi du temps.
6.  **Intégration dans `App.tsx`** : Ajout de la route pour afficher le composant.

Voici le code :

payload.text: comment se faire la sélection des établissements

La sélection des établissements se fait actuellement de deux manières dans l'application, selon le rôle de l'utilisateur connecté : 1. **Pour le Super Administrateur (SUPER_ADMIN)** : * Un sélecteur d'établissement (menu déroulant) est visible en haut à gauche de l'en-tête (Header), à côté du logo. * Ce menu liste toutes les écoles disponibles dans la base de données. * Lorsqu'une école est sélectionnée, l'état `activeSchool` est mis à jour et toutes les données (élèves, profs, finances) sont filtrées pour ne montrer que celles de cette école. 2. **Pour les Utilisateurs Normaux (ADMIN, PROF, ÉLÈVE...)** : * L'établissement est déterminé automatiquement lors de la connexion (`LoginScreen`). * Chaque utilisateur possède une propriété `schoolId` dans son profil (`SystemUser`). * Au moment du login, l'application charge cet ID et verrouille l'utilisateur sur son école. Il ne voit pas le sélecteur d'établissement. **Pour répondre précisément à votre question "Comment se fait la sélection" (sous-entendu : comment l'implémenter ou l'utiliser) :** Si vous êtes connecté en tant que **Super Admin** (via le bouton violet "Super Admin" sur l'écran de connexion), cliquez sur le nom de l'établissement en haut à gauche (ex: "Lycée d'Excellence..."). Un menu déroulant apparaîtra pour choisir "Groupe Scolaire Les Pépites" ou toute autre école créée. Si vous voulez voir le code correspondant, c'est dans `App.tsx`, dans la section `
` : ```tsx {/* School Selector for Super Admin */} {currentUser.role === 'SUPER_ADMIN' && activeSchool ? (
{/* Dropdown content */}
{schools.map(s => ( ))}
) : ( // ... Affichage statique pour les autres rôles )}

Au lieu de se baser sur des rôles codés en dur ou des lectures de session locales, je vais passer l'utilisateur connecté (`currentUser`) à tous les composants principaux et utiliser la méthode centrale `db.hasPermission()` pour vérifier les droits d'écriture (`.write`) sur chaque bouton d'action (Ajouter, Modifier, Supprimer).

Voici les corrections apportées :

1.  **`App.tsx`** : Passage de la propriété `currentUser` aux composants `StudentList`, `TeachersList`, `FinanceManager`, `ResourcesManager`.
2.  **`components/TeachersList.tsx`** : Ajout du contrôle de permission `TEACHERS.write` pour masquer le bouton "Ajouter" et les actions de modification/suppression.
3.  **`components/StudentList.tsx`** : Utilisation de la prop `currentUser` au lieu du `localStorage` pour une vérification plus fiable des droits `STUDENTS.enroll` et `STUDENTS.transfer`.
4.  **`components/FinanceManager.tsx`** : Ajout du contrôle `FINANCE.write` pour protéger les boutons "Nouveau Paiement" et "Émettre Bulletin".
5.  **`components/LibraryManager.tsx`** : Remplacement de la logique "isLibrarian" par la permission stricte `LIBRARY.write` définie dans la configuration.
6.  **`components/ResourcesManager.tsx`** : Utilisation de la prop `currentUser` et de la permission `RESOURCES.write` pour l'upload et la suppression.

**Assessing the Core Issues**

I've been drilling down on the application's problems.  I'm focusing on "Check all errors in the application and fix them to make the application functional." right now. My approach is to evaluate the goal and then identify the specific issues. I'm building a list and prioritizing.

I'm now identifying discrepancies between type definitions and actual usage. The `SchoolModule` type misses the `SETTINGS` module, and I've found an instance of an "any" type cast in `Sidebar.tsx`. I'm also carefully checking newly added fields like `sex` and `capacity` across interfaces, as well as the `room` property in `TimeSlot` and checking that older mock data is consistent with these. I'm focusing on ensuring all existing mocks align with the current type definitions.


**Analyzing Mock Data Alignment**

I'm verifying that the MOCK_EVENTS data now consistently uses `category` instead of the deprecated `type`. I've also spotted a potential issue in `TimeTableManager.tsx`.  The `calculateTeacherStats` and `calculateClassStats` calls should be within `useMemo` hooks, as they depend on `selectedEntityId` and `timeSlots`. This is critical for avoiding unwanted re-renders and potential performance bottlenecks.  Furthermore, the time comparison in `getSlotForCell` seems fragile given how `TIME_ROWS` is structured.


**Debugging Print Functionality**

I'm currently addressing some key bugs in the print functionality. The print window generation can fail completely if the selected teacher isn't present, leading to a crash or blank output. Additionally, the teacher's subject in the print template has an unexpected `toUpperCase()` call, throwing an error when the subject is missing. I've also found a mismatch in the capitalization of `dayOfWeek` in `TimeSlot` and `ADMIN_DAYS`.



**Evaluating Data Integrity**

I'm now focusing on potential data inconsistencies across the application. I've pinpointed an issue related to the print functionality – printing a tuition payment using a function designed for salaries could yield misleading results, though the UI prevents this specific misuse. Furthermore, I've analyzed prop passing in `StudentList.tsx` and the conflict detection logic in `db.ts` which seems robust. Also, I discovered that the `handleRefreshData` function in `App.tsx` refreshes some data but not all, which needs immediate attention.


**Addressing UI Interactions**

I'm now investigating `AcademicManager.tsx`. The UI seems robust, handling edge cases such as zero capacity in the `fillPercentage` calculation. I've also focused on `Sidebar.tsx`, where I've confirmed that the permissions logic is sound, ensuring `SETTINGS.write` access for relevant roles through the `DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS` check in `constants.ts`. Currently, I'm examining how navigation logic integrates into this. I've assessed the `handleNavigate` function and checked `isSettingsUnlocked`, and the logic seems to align with the overall permissioning strategy.


**Refining Calendar Logic**

I'm zeroing in on the CalendarView component. I've pinpointed a critical issue where the component ignores the passed 'events' prop, fetching data based on a hardcoded school ID instead. This is a significant bug in a multi-tenant environment. I'm prioritizing fixing the data loading in CalendarView now, to ensure the right events are displayed per school. I'm also examining the Student type's grade property.


**Fixing Data Loading**

I'm now zeroing in on the CalendarView component. The current implementation is flawed as it breaks the multi-school concept and needs fixing to load the correct data. Specifically, it ignores the props passed from `App.tsx` and fetches data for the *first* school in the DB, which needs urgent attention. I've also identified a crash potential if a subject is missing from the subject field, and plan to implement `useMemo` hooks for performance.


**Implementing Necessary Updates**

I'm now implementing the identified fixes. CalendarView has been updated to remove the hardcoded school ID and uses the `events` prop. Also, I've added the safety checks for the `selectedTeacher.subject` before `toUpperCase()` in `TimeTableManager`. I'm verifying the fix works as expected. I'm also ensuring that `color` in `TimeSlot` is handled safely.


**Optimizing Event Handling**

I'm now revising the event management flow. The current implementation in `App.tsx` requires refinement. `CalendarView` needs an `onRefresh` callback to communicate event changes. I'll modify `App.tsx` so that `CalendarView` can call `db.saveEvent` and trigger a data refresh, thereby keeping the global event state consistent across components. I'm focusing on ensuring data synchronization between components, especially when adding or deleting events through the calendar.


**Reviewing Component Integration**

I'm now integrating the `onRefresh` callback into `CalendarView` and linking it to the `App.tsx` state. This will ensure that changes made through the calendar are reflected application-wide, maintaining data consistency. I'm focusing on the interaction between `App.tsx`, `CalendarView`, and the database to streamline event management, including adding and deleting events.

**Integrating Recent Changes**

I've successfully integrated the `onRefresh` callback into `CalendarView` and connected it to the `App.tsx` state. The initial issue of the hardcoded school ID has been resolved and the updates have been tested, ensuring data consistency across the application. I also implemented `useEffect` in `CalendarView` to make the prop-based events dynamic. The calculations in `TimeTableManager.tsx` are now wrapped in `useMemo` for optimization, improving performance. Finally, I addressed the potential crash risk in `TimeTableManager.tsx` related to the `toUpperCase` call, ensuring the application handles missing subjects gracefully.


**Reviewing TimeTableManager**

I'm now focusing on `TimeTableManager.tsx`, specifically reviewing the changes made to handle the potential crash with undefined subjects. I'm also confirming the implementation of `useMemo` for the stats calculations to ensure optimal performance. My goal is to verify the code is robust and efficient.


**Implementing the Updates**

I'm now implementing the updates. In `TimeTableManager.tsx`, I've updated the subject display to handle undefined subjects safely, preventing the application crash. Also, in `CalendarView.tsx`, I am addressing the incorrect school ID issue by using the `currentSchoolId` prop to ensure the component displays events relevant to the currently logged-in school. In `App.tsx`, I'm modifying the render of `CalendarView` to pass the `currentSchoolId` and `onRefresh` prop to ensure proper functionality.

Je vais corriger les erreurs critiques identifiées pour garantir la stabilité et la fonctionnalité multi-établissements de l'application.

Voici les corrections apportées :

1.  **`components/CalendarView.tsx`** :
    *   **Correction Critique** : Le calendrier chargeait arbitrairement les événements de la *première école* trouvée (`schools[0]`), brisant l'isolation des données en mode multi-établissements. J'ai remplacé cette logique par l'utilisation stricte de l'ID de l'école active (`currentSchoolId`) passé en prop.
    *   **Synchronisation** : Ajout d'un `useEffect` pour mettre à jour la vue locale lorsque les données changent dans le parent (`App.tsx`).
    *   **Rafraîchissement** : Implémentation du callback `onRefresh` pour que l'ajout d'un événement mette à jour les données globales instantanément.

2.  **`components/TimeTableManager.tsx`** :
    *   **Prévention de Crash** : Sécurisation de l'affichage du sujet du professeur (`toUpperCase()`) qui faisait planter l'application si le champ était vide.
    *   **Optimisation** : Enveloppement des calculs statistiques lourds (heures par classe/matière) dans des `useMemo` pour éviter les ralentissements lors de la saisie.

3.  **`App.tsx`** :
    *   **Câblage** : Passage des propriétés manquantes (`currentSchoolId`, `onRefresh`) au composant `CalendarView` pour finaliser la correction.

2.  **Frontend** : L'application React existante packagée.
3.  **Fichiers de configuration** : `.env`, `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`.
4.  **README.md** : Un guide détaillé pour l'installation et le lancement.

Configuration principale du projet (Frontend + Backend), scripts de build et dépendances.

le fichier .env n'existe pas

Il semble que le fichier `.env` soit manquant dans votre projet. Pour une application web React comme celle-ci, les variables d'environnement sont essentielles pour stocker des informations sensibles (comme les clés d'API) et des configurations spécifiques (comme l'URL du backend ou le mode de déploiement).

Je vais créer un fichier `.env` avec une structure de base adaptée à votre projet "EcolePro".

**Contenu typique d'un fichier .env pour ce projet :**

1.  `API_KEY`: Votre clé Google Gemini API (obligatoire pour les fonctions IA).
2.  `PORT`: Le port sur lequel le serveur backend (optionnel) écouterait.
3.  `NODE_ENV`: L'environnement d'exécution (development/production).

**Note importante :** Le fichier `.env` ne doit jamais être commité dans un dépôt public (Git) s'il contient des clés réelles.

I'm prioritizing the user's explicit preference for frontend/backend separation, which conflicts with avoiding a nested "src" directory.


**Updating Payment Options**

I've expanded the payment options in the FinanceManager and corresponding types, including "Orange Money," "MTN Money," "Moov Money," "Wave Money," "Virement Bancaire," and "Transfert Bancaire." I've also implemented a mandatory "Référence de transaction" field for mobile and virement payments. This ensures the required data is collected. Furthermore, I've designed the UI with a professional "Windows App" look, tab-based navigation, and high-contrast borders, as per the user's explicit preference.


**Completing Core Logic**

I'm now integrating the backend and frontend components to achieve a complete school management application. I'll focus on implementing the required payment methods within the `FinanceManager`, specifically incorporating Orange Money, MTN Money, Moov Money, Wave Money, Virement Bancaire, and Transfert Bancaire options, using FCFA as the currency. I'll then integrate them in the system.
